title: toona ciliata var. sublaxiflora
intro: Toona ciliata var. sublaxiflora, also known as the Southern Toona, is a variety of tree found in the tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its large leaves and fragrant wood. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues and fever. The health benefits of Toona ciliata var. sublaxiflora include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to fight off certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Toona ciliata var. sublaxiflora include infusions of the leaves and bark, as well as extracts used in pharmaceutical formulations, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
